title: Tag Validator
description:

constraints: code consists of English letters, digits, '<', '>', '/', '!', '[', ']', '.', and ' '.

examples.example_text:
Input: code = "
This is the first line ]]>

and

>>" is because of the rule 6. The reason why cdata is NOT "]>]]>]]>" is because of the rule 7.
